name: Eggs a La Wedgewood
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large skillet, scramble the eggs with the chopped parsley and nutmeg.
2. In a 9-inch square baking dish, layer the scrambled eggs, salt, pepper, sour cream, green onions, cooked bacon pieces, mushrooms, and shredded cheddar cheese.
3. Refrigerate the casserole overnight.
4. Preheat an oven to 300°F (150°C).
5. Bake the casserole for 20 to 30 minutes, or until the cheese is melted. Do not overbake.
